agent_promises: 36% guaranteed income within a week for lifetime

product_fit.mismatch_reason: The 12-year payment term is unsuitable for a 58-year-old customer.
missed_opportunities: Did not ask about existing retirement corpus or pension plans.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is open to receiving information but is skeptical about the long-term commitment given his age.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced an HDFC Life campaign offering a guaranteed income plan, to which the customer responded with interest.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was initially passive and requested details, then pushed back on the 12-year payment term due to his age.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer objected to the 12-year payment term, stating he would be 70 and not need the money then.
call_narrative.ending: Customer requested the agent to send details via WhatsApp after the senior agent suggested a shorter 5-year term.

key_quotes: Aap mere ko detail mein share kar dijiye iska number.
Nahi, kyunki main 70 ka ho jaunga, us time mujhe paise ki zaroorat nahi hai.
red_flags: Agent promised 36% guaranteed income within a week, which is highly suspicious and likely a misrepresentation.
